## Change

Explain the problem, solution, and files affected.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass or are not affected
- [ ] Frontend tests/build pass or are not affected
- [ ] New behavior has a focused test
- [ ] Documentation and demo evidence are updated when user-visible

## Safety review

- [ ] No credentials, citizen data, personal paths, or generated dependency folders are committed
- [ ] External integrations remain mocked/sandboxed unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] Authorization, AI, privacy, and data-flow changes are explained
- [ ] Logs and screenshots are sanitized
